name: weather-agent-cdk-v2
description: Weather Agent with Slack Integration - CDK v2 (Gateway-based)

scripts.deploy: npm run build && cdk deploy --all --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:image: npm run build && cdk deploy WeatherAgentImageStack --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:agent: npm run build && cdk deploy WeatherAgentCoreStack --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:slack: npm run build && cdk deploy WeatherAgentSlackStack --require-approval never
